translatedText: Karni na farko BC - Giant na ƙarni na farko

sourceText: From a young age, Peter endured intense court intrigues and instability. The immense human and material costs of the protracted Great Northern War also inflicted great suffering during his reign.
translatedText: Tun yana ƙarami, Bitrus ya jimre da zaɓen kotu da rashin kwanciyar hankali. Babban tsadar ɗan adam da abin duniya na yaƙin Arewa da aka daɗe ya jawo wahalhalu a lokacin mulkinsa.

sourceText: With a strong will and a deep understanding of Western culture, he implemented sweeping military, administrative, and cultural reforms. Through relentless effort and strategic campaigns, he secured victory in war, founded a new capital, and significantly boosted Russia's power.
translatedText: Tare da ƙaƙƙarfan nufin da zurfin fahimtar al'adun Yammacin Turai, ya aiwatar da sauye-sauye na soja, gudanarwa, da al'adu. Ta hanyar yunƙuri da dabarun yaƙi, ya sami nasara a yaƙi, ya kafa sabon babban birni, kuma ya ƙarfafa ikon Rasha sosai.

sourceText: As a German princess married into the Russian imperial family, she endured a loveless marriage and political isolation. Her ascension to the throne involved a coup, which led to ongoing legitimacy challenges and numerous rebellion attempts.
translatedText: A matsayinta na gimbiya Jamus ta yi aure cikin dangin daular Rasha, ta jimre da aure marar ƙauna da warewar siyasa. Hawanta kan karagar mulki ya hada da juyin mulki, wanda ya haifar da kalubalen halayya da kuma yunkurin tawaye da dama.

sourceText: Through exceptional political acumen and diplomatic skill, she garnered the support of the Russian nobility and successfully executed a coup to claim the throne. She actively embraced Enlightenment principles, focusing on legal reforms, educational advancements, and the promotion of arts and culture. By strengthening the military and expanding the empire's borders, she solidified Russia's position as a major European power.
translatedText: Ta hanyar bajintar siyasa da fasaha na diflomasiyya, ta sami goyon bayan manyan sarakunan Rasha kuma ta yi nasarar aiwatar da juyin mulki don neman kujerar sarauta. Ta rungumi ƙa'idodin Haskakawa, tana mai da hankali kan gyare-gyaren doka, ci gaban ilimi, da haɓaka fasaha da al'adu. Ta hanyar karfafa sojoji da fadada iyakokin daular, ta karfafa matsayin Rasha a matsayin babbar kasar Turai.

sourceText: During World War I, I worked in a casualty clearing station and witnessed the horrific suffering of soldiers succumbing to infection. The antiseptics we had then were of limited use and often did more harm than good. Later, in the early days of penicillin, there were significant challenges in fully recognizing its potential and bringing it to widespread use.
translatedText: A lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na ɗaya, na yi aiki a wani tashar da aka kashe mutane kuma na ga yadda sojoji suka kamu da cutar. Magungunan antiseptik da muke da su a lokacin suna da iyakacin amfani kuma galibi suna yin illa fiye da kyau. Daga baya, a farkon farkon maganin penicillin, an sami ƙalubale masu mahimmanci wajen fahimtar yuwuwar sa da kuma kawo shi ga amfani da shi.

sourceText: I dedicated myself to bacteriology, seeking effective ways to combat infections. Through careful observation of a chance contamination in my laboratory, I identified the antibacterial properties of penicillin. I persevered in studying its effects, developing methods for its cultivation and purification. Collaboration with colleagues helped demonstrate its clinical value and paved the way for mass production, saving innumerable lives.
translatedText: Na sadaukar da kaina ga ilimin ƙwayoyin cuta, neman ingantattun hanyoyin magance cututtuka. Ta hanyar lura da hankali game da gurɓacewar dama a cikin dakin gwaje-gwaje na, na gano abubuwan kashe ƙwayoyin penicillin. Na dage wajen nazarin illolinsa, da samar da hanyoyin nomansa da tsarkakewa. Haɗin kai tare da abokan aiki sun taimaka wajen nuna ƙimar asibiti da kuma buɗe hanyar samar da taro, ceton rayuka marasa adadi.

sourceText: I have no wish to be immortal, but I desire to be a good man.
translatedText: Ba ni da burin in zama marar mutuwa, amma ina fata in zama mutumin kirki.

sourceText: Born illegitimate, orphaned at a young age, and struggling with poverty, he faced constant political opposition and personal scandals.
translatedText: An haife shi a shege, marayu tun yana matashi, kuma yana fama da talauci, ya fuskanci adawar siyasa da kuma badakalar kai.

sourceText: Through exceptional intellect and an indomitable will, he pursued his education and dedicated himself to military service. He leveraged his talents for his country, overcoming adversity to become a pivotal figure in America's founding.
translatedText: Ta hanyar basira na musamman da kuma niyya mara iyaka, ya ci gaba da karatunsa kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga aikin soja. Ya yi amfani da basirarsa ga kasarsa, inda ya shawo kan wahalhalu ya zama jigo a kafuwar Amurka.

sourceText: The only thing that never is, is a Rarity. If you have a Rarity, make it a Rarity.
translatedText: Iyakar abin da bai taba ba, shine Rarity. Idan kana da Rarity, sanya shi Rarity.

sourceText: He endured rigorous training to become a printer amidst childhood poverty and his father's opposition. He also faced numerous challenges, including business disputes with his brother, the death of his wife, and prolonged separations from his family due to his political activities.
translatedText: Ya jimre da ƙwaƙƙwaran horo don zama mawallafi a cikin talaucin ƙuruciya da adawar mahaifinsa. Ya kuma fuskanci kalubale da dama da suka hada da rikicin kasuwanci da dan uwansa, mutuwar matarsa, da kuma tsawaita rabuwa da danginsa saboda harkokin siyasa.

sourceText: Franklin overcame hardships through continuous self-improvement and diligence. He acquired knowledge through self-study, successfully led various businesses, and contributed to community development by organizing civic groups. His exceptional diplomacy and foresight played a crucial role in American independence and nation-building.
translatedText: Franklin ya shawo kan wahalhalu ta hanyar ci gaba da inganta kai da himma. Ya sami ilimi ta hanyar nazarin kansa, ya sami nasarar jagorantar kasuwanci daban-daban, kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban al'umma ta hanyar tsara ƙungiyoyin jama'a. Diflomasiyyarsa ta musamman da hangen nesa ta taka muhimmiyar rawa a cikin 'yancin kai na Amurka da gina kasa.

sourceText: Bacon struggled constantly between his political ambitions and scholarly pursuits. He faced numerous political crises due to power struggles and envious rivals, ultimately being convicted of bribery, imprisoned, and then released, enduring significant hardships.
translatedText: Bacon yana fama kullum tsakanin burinsa na siyasa da neman ilimi. Ya fuskanci rikice-rikicen siyasa da dama saboda gwagwarmayar mulki da abokan hamayyar hassada, inda a karshe aka same shi da laifin cin hanci, a daure shi, sannan aka sake shi, yana jure wahalhalu masu yawa.

sourceText: Despite his political downfall, Bacon never lost his passion for learning. In seclusion, he completed great works like 'Novum Organum,' further developing his philosophy and leaving an immortal legacy that profoundly influenced posterity. His recovery lay in his indomitable will to pursue knowledge without ceasing, even amidst setbacks.
translatedText: Duk da faduwar siyasarsa, Bacon bai daina sha'awar koyo ba. A keɓance, ya kammala manyan ayyuka kamar 'Novum Organum,' yana ƙara haɓaka falsafarsa da barin gado mara mutuwa wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga zuriya. Farfaɗonsa yana cikin sha'awarsa marar ƙarfi don neman ilimi ba tare da gushewa ba, ko da a cikin koma baya.

sourceText: The book of nature is written in the language of mathematics.
translatedText: An rubuta littafin yanayi a cikin harshen lissafi.

sourceText: Suffered from smallpox in childhood, leaving him with poor eyesight and deformed fingers. He also endured his father's disappearance and his mother's accusation of witchcraft. Financial hardships and religious persecution were constant companions.
translatedText: Ya yi fama da ciwon ƙanƙara a lokacin ƙuruciya, ya bar shi da ƙarancin gani da nakasassun yatsu. Ya kuma jure bacewar mahaifinsa da zargin da mahaifiyarsa ta yi masa na maita. Wahalhalun kuɗi da tsanantawar addini sun kasance abokai na dindindin.

sourceText: Overcame these adversities through deep faith and unwavering perseverance. He meticulously analyzed Tycho Brahe's extensive observational data to formulate his laws of planetary motion, employing mathematics and physics to unravel the universe's secrets.
translatedText: Na shawo kan waɗannan masifu ta wurin bangaskiya mai zurfi da juriya mara kaushi. Ya yi nazari sosai kan manyan bayanan lura da Tycho Brahe don tsara dokokinsa na motsin duniya, yin amfani da ilimin lissafi da kimiyyar lissafi don tona asirin duniya.

sourceText: Ask not what your country can do for you—ask what you can do for your country.
translatedText: Kada ku tambayi abin da ƙasarku za ta iya yi muku - ku tambayi abin da za ku iya yi wa ƙasarku.

sourceText: Chronic back pain since childhood, survival of the PT-109 sinking during WWII, and immense pressure during crises like the Cuban Missile Crisis.
translatedText: Ciwon baya na yau da kullun tun lokacin ƙuruciya, tsirar PT-109 da ke nutsewa a lokacin WWII, da matsanancin matsin lamba yayin rikice-rikice kamar Rikicin Makami mai linzami na Cuban.

sourceText: He endured chronic pain with remarkable resilience and a strong will. The trauma of war deepened his commitment to peace. In political crises, he responded with calm deliberation and decisive action.
translatedText: Ya jimre da ciwo mai tsanani tare da juriya mai ban mamaki da karfi mai karfi. Tashin hankali na yaki ya zurfafa himmarsa ga zaman lafiya. A cikin rikice-rikicen siyasa, ya mayar da martani cikin natsuwa tare da yanke hukunci.

sourceText: The early death of her father, her mother's overbearing control, political instability in her early reign, and the profound grief and prolonged mourning following the sudden death of her beloved husband, Prince Albert.
translatedText: Mutuwar farko ta mahaifinta, ikon mahaifiyarta, rashin kwanciyar hankali na siyasa a farkon mulkinta, da kuma tsananin baƙin ciki da dogon jimami bayan mutuwar mijinta ƙaunataccen, Yarima Albert.

sourceText: Despite her personal tragedy, she resolutely continued her duties as monarch, upholding Prince Albert's vision for public works, arts, and sciences. She maintained stability within the British Empire and became a symbol of endurance and duty through her frugal and exemplary life, earning the respect of her subjects.
translatedText: Duk da bala'in da ta same ta, ta ci gaba da yunƙurin ci gaba da aikinta na sarauta, tare da tabbatar da hangen nesa na Prince Albert game da ayyukan jama'a, fasaha, da kimiyya. Ta kasance da kwanciyar hankali a cikin daular Biritaniya kuma ta zama alama ta juriya da aiki ta hanyar rayuwarta ta taƙama da abin koyi, tana samun girmamawa ga talakawanta.

sourceText: I have no fear that the result of our choice will prove mistaken. I have no fear of the result of our election.
translatedText: Ba ni da fargabar cewa sakamakon zaben da muka yi zai nuna kuskure. Bani da fargabar sakamakon zaben mu.

sourceText: Jefferson grappled with the profound contradiction of owning slaves while espousing principles of liberty, faced intense political rivalries, and endured personal tragedies.
translatedText: Jefferson ya koka da babban sabani na mallakar bayi yayin da yake bin ka'idojin 'yanci, ya fuskanci kishiyoyin siyasa, da kuma jure masifu.

sourceText: He sought solace and guidance in Enlightenment ideals, reason, and education, tirelessly working to advance his vision for the nation despite these challenges.
translatedText: Ya nemi ta’aziyya da ja-gora a kan akidu, tunani, da ilimi, ya jajirce wajen ciyar da al’umma gaba duk da wadannan kalubale.
